---
title: "00 — Environment setup & checks"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, warning = TRUE)
PROJECT_ROOT <- Sys.getenv("CAPLAN_ROOT")
if (PROJECT_ROOT == "") PROJECT_ROOT <- rprojroot::find_root(rprojroot::has_file("_config.R"))
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = PROJECT_ROOT)
source(file.path(PROJECT_ROOT, "_config.R"))
source(file.path(PROJECT_ROOT, "R", "helpers.R"))
```

Confirms the R + Python environment before running the pipeline. If anything here
fails, fix it before proceeding (see `install_packages.R` and `requirements.txt`).

## R packages

```{r r-packages}
needed <- c("data.table", "arrow", "dplyr", "tidyr", "stringi", "readr",
            "lubridate", "jsonlite", "httr2", "ggplot2", "patchwork",
            "fixest", "did", "fect", "usmap", "sf")
status <- sapply(needed, function(p) requireNamespace(p, quietly = TRUE))
print(data.frame(package = needed, installed = status))
missing <- needed[!status]
if (length(missing)) {
  warning("Missing R packages: ", paste(missing, collapse = ", "),
          " — run install_packages.R")
}

# GitHub-only robustness packages (optional but used in step 10)
for (p in c("DIDmultiplegt", "DIDmultiplegtDYN", "HonestDiD")) {
  message(p, ": ", if (requireNamespace(p, quietly = TRUE)) "ok" else "MISSING (step 10)")
}
```

## Python + GPU

```{r python-check}
exit_code <- system2(PYTHON_EXE,
                     args = shQuote(file.path(PROJECT_ROOT, "python", "00_setup_check.py")),
                     stdout = "", stderr = "", wait = TRUE)
if (exit_code != 0) warning("python/00_setup_check.py exited ", exit_code)
```

## Directory tree

```{r dirs}
for (d in c(DATA_RAW, DATA_PARQUET, DATA_PANELS, MODELS_DIR, FIGURES_DIR,
            TABLES_DIR, OUTPUT_HTML, OUTPUT_LOGS)) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-14s %s\n", if (dir.exists(d)) "[ok]" else "[missing]", d))
}
cat("\nOverleaf targets (edit _config.R if these are wrong):\n")
cat("  Figures:", OVERLEAF_FIGURES, "\n  Tables: ", OVERLEAF_TABLES, "\n")
```
